name: BANNER CORP
business: Banner Corporation is a bank holding company that wholly owns Banner Bank, a Washington-chartered commercial bank. It offers commercial banking services and financial products to individuals, businesses and public sector entities in Washington, Oregon, California, Idaho, Utah and Nevada. The bank's primary business is accepting deposits and originating loans, including commercial real estate, agriculture, construction, residential, multifamily, SBA, and consumer loans.

exposures.sentence: Agriculture is a major industry in several of our markets.
We originate loans secured by first mortgages on one- to four-family residences in the markets we serve.
Historically, we have invested a significant portion of our loan portfolio in residential construction and land loans to professional home builders and developers.
the ability to adapt to rapid technological changes, including advancements in artificial intelligence, digital banking platforms, and cybersecurity
